# Quester Client — Copilot Instructions

Flutter mobile/web app (quester_client). Task/quest management with group support, offline mode, and push notifications via Firebase.

## Build & Run Commands

```bash
flutter pub get                           # install dependencies
flutter run                               # run (select device when prompted)
flutter test                              # run unit/widget tests
dart run build_runner build               # regenerate Drift .g.dart files
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs  # force regen
flutter build apk                         # Android release build
```

> **Never edit `*.g.dart` files** — they are generated by `build_runner` from Drift table/DAO definitions.

## Architecture

```
lib/
  main.dart               # Bootstrap: Firebase init, BuildConfig, AppInitializer.init()
  app.dart                # Root widget: MaterialApp.router, FCM nudge dialog
  firebase_options.dart   # Generated Firebase config (do not edit)
  core/
    data/                 # Drift tables (data_tables.dart), DAOs, AppDatabase
    dto/                  # JSON (de)serialization for API requests/responses
    http/                 # ApiClient (Dio-based)
    models/               # Domain models (e.g. auth.dart)
    providers/            # Riverpod providers (see below)
    router/               # GoRouter setup with auth redirect
    services/             # Business logic (AppInitializer, AuthService, GroupsService, etc.)
    utils/                # logger_util, etc.
  features/
    auth/                 # LoginScreen
    groups/               # UserGroupsScreen, GroupHomeScreen
    quests/               # QuestDetailsScreen, QuestActionsNotifier
    home/                 # HomeScreen
    splash/               # SplashScreen
  dev/                    # Development-only: MockApiClient, DevDataSeeder
```

## State Management — Riverpod

Providers are split by concern across four files:

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `core_providers.dart` | Infrastructure: `SharedPreferences`, `FlutterSecureStorage`, `AuthService`, `ApiClient`, `installationIdProvider` |
| `data_providers.dart` | Database: `databaseProvider` (FutureProvider), DAOs (`groupsDaoProvider`, etc.) |
| `service_providers.dart` | Services: `GroupsService`, `QuestsService` |
| Feature notifiers | Per-feature `AsyncNotifier`/`StateNotifier` live alongside their screens |

`installationIdProvider` is intentionally unimplemented and **must be overridden** in `main()` via `ProviderScope(overrides: [...])`.

## Key Conventions

- **Auth**: Custom session-token auth, not OAuth. Headers: `X-Installation-ID` (device fingerprint) and `X-Session-Token` injected by `ApiClient` Dio interceptors.
- **Offline mode**: `GroupsService.createGroup()` and select other methods accept `offline: true` to skip API calls and write only to local Drift DB.
- **Local DB**: Drift (SQLite). Tables: `Groups`, `Users`, `GroupMembers`, `Quests`. Access via DAOs on `AppDatabase`.
- **Sync pattern**: `SyncService` pulls delta updates from the backend using a `lastUpdateTime` watermark.
- **AppInitializer**: Static class with `late final` fields initialized once in `main()`. Must call `AppInitializer.init()` before providers that depend on it are read.
- **Router**: GoRouter with `_RouterNotifier` bridging Riverpod auth state to GoRouter's `refreshListenable`. Auth redirect handles splash → login/home.
- **FCM**: Handled in `FcmHandler`; incoming quest nudges surface as dialogs via `incomingQuestProvider` listened at root widget level.

## Debug API URLs

In `kDebugMode`, API base URL is platform-specific (set in `main.dart`):

| Platform | URL |
|---|---|
| Android emulator | `http://10.0.2.2:8100/api/v1/` |
| Web / other | `http://localhost:8100/api/v1/` |

Production URL is currently set to localhost — update before release.

## Common Pitfalls

- DAOs use `databaseProvider.requireValue` — Drift DB must be open before accessing DAOs. Wrap in `FutureProvider` chains or ensure `AppInitializer.init()` awaits `AppDatabase.open()`.
- Adding a new Drift table requires: define table class in `data_tables.dart`, add to `@DriftDatabase(tables: [...])`, create DAO, run `build_runner`.
- `dev/` code (MockApiClient, DevDataSeeder) is for local development only; keep it out of production code paths.
- UI strings are currently mixed Polish/English — follow the existing pattern in the file you're editing.
